title: Craftable animals
description:
Hi! This mod allows you to craft any mob that is in minecraft. But there is also the possibility to craft a spawner.
Please use JEI to view current crafting.
body:

![w](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14e92c50fe9d6d8f95d641934b82b6007827df17_0.webp)
# Hi! This mod allows you to craft any mob that is in minecraft. But there is also the possibility to craft a spawner.
Please use JEI to view current crafting.
